input: Create a tracking matrix template for 'Sprint Task Tracker' with owner, status, priority, and due dates.
expected_behavior: Produces YAML spec with 3 sheets (Tracker, Summary, Config). Tracker has ID, Item, Owner, Status, Priority, dates, % Complete, Notes. Config provides dropdown values. Summary has COUNTA/COUNTIF formulas. Conditional formatting uses semantic colors.

input: Generate a metrics dashboard template for 'Agent Performance Dashboard' with KPIs, trends, and alerts.
expected_behavior: Produces YAML spec with 4 sheets (KPIs, Trends, Alerts, Config). KPIs has current vs target with percentage calculation and sparklines. Alerts auto-filters out-of-range KPIs. Division-by-zero guards on all formulas.

input: Build a tracking matrix where overdue items turn red and completed items turn green automatically.
expected_behavior: Status column uses semantic conditional formatting (green=#c6efce for Completado, red=#ffc7ce for Bloqueado). Due Date column highlights overdue (date < today AND status != Completado). Data bars on percentage columns.

input: Create a metrics dashboard for 25 KPIs across 4 categories: performance, quality, cost, and adoption.
expected_behavior: Handles >20 KPI edge case by splitting into category sub-tables with subtotals. Uses named ranges for cross-sheet references. Config sheet clearly labeled for editing thresholds.

input: Create an XLSX template for our project.
expected_behavior: Since type and title are missing, interviews the user to determine tracking-matrix vs metrics-dashboard and the template title. Asks clarifying questions about columns, owners, and KPIs before generating.
